title: Creamy Spanish Kabse Spice Paella
description: A romantic and high-protein-friendly Spanish dish featuring kabse spice, dumplings, and a creamy sauce, perfect for a special dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat, add onions and garlic, sauté until soft.
Add chicken thighs to the skillet, season with salt and pepper, cook until golden brown on all sides.
Remove chicken from skillet and set aside. Add mushrooms to the same pan, sauté for 5 minutes until softened.
In a separate pot, mix kabse spice with tomato puree, let it simmer for 10 minutes then add heavy cream, stir well until thickened.
Return chicken and any accumulated juices back into the skillet along with vegetables. Pour in prepared creamy sauce.
Cook over low heat for about 5-7 minutes allowing flavors to meld together.
Fold dumplings gently into paella mixture, cover and let cook for an additional 30 minutes or until dumplings are cooked through and liquid is absorbed.
